codeReview.summary: Implementation fully covers all feature requirements. Created automation_template table schema with trigger/action JSON configs, AutomationTemplateRepository with CRUD operations, AutomationTemplateService with applyTemplate method, and API endpoints for template management. Seeded 20+ industry-specific templates across 5 business types (beauty, health, fitness, professional, technical) covering all required categories: post-treatment reminder, client reactivation, class reminder, birthday greeting, welcome message, no-show follow-up.

summary: Feature m5-2-automation-templates successfully implemented. The automation templates feature provides: (1) Template definitions for 6 workflow types across 5 business types, (2) API endpoints to get templates by business type (GET /automations/templates?businessType=X), (3) Apply template creates automation with pre-filled config (POST /automations/templates/:id/apply), (4) Users can customize templates via optional name/description parameters. Implementation follows all architecture conventions - proper schema with singular naming, repository pattern, business service with DI, service registration in services.ts, and TypeScript typing. No issues found.
